title: Marketplace Manager - BikeDekho Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BikeDekho Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Marketplace Manager looking for your next big career move? BikeDekho Advisory Limited in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!
